title: Read backend code to display admin password

requirements.text: Read and display the contents of backend/main.mo file to show the user the hardcoded admin password value configured in the password-based authentication system
acceptanceCriteria: The backend/main.mo file contents are read successfully
The hardcoded admin password value is identified and displayed to the user
The password is shown in clear text so the user can use it for admin access

constraints: Only read the file, do not modify any backend code
Display the exact password value without modifications
